final:
// // When both selection bits are low (00), the output should be set to b
module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input sel_b1,
    input sel_b2,
    output reg out_always
);always @(*) begin
    case ({sel_b2, sel_b1})
        2'b11: out_always = b;
        default: out_always = a;
    endcase
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When both selection bits are low (00), the output should be set to b
